validate.notes: All 4 checks passed: Docker build OK, NOP test reward=0 (12 fail-to-pass tests correctly fail on base commit), Gold test reward=1 (16/16 tests pass after solve.sh), Rubric judge ICR=1.0 (2/2 rules). p2p_enrich.notes: Added 4 repo_tests pass_to_pass gates using actual CI commands: test_repo_prettier_claude_md (npx prettier --check CLAUDE.md), test_repo_prettier_package_json (npx prettier --check package.json), test_repo_claude_md_exists (file existence), test_repo_prettier_rc_files (.prettierrc.json valid). CI commands tested: pnpm install works, npx prettier --check works, npx sort-package-json fails (unsorted), npx eslint fails (needs deps), pnpm lint fails (turbo not in path). Selected lightweight prettier formatting checks that exercise the same tools used by the post-edit hook.
